reviews.review_description: The storytelling is engaging, and the pace of the experience is highly reflective. It’s a simple story, but beyond the narrative itself, I particularly appreciated the straightforward onboarding UI that accompanies you throughout. It feels very tactile, and the use of physics makes the experience feel more organic and real 🤍

This app is brilliant. A really great experience of the Winter Solstice in Newgrange. Even better that it is free. Well done. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a mixture of immersive heritage and mindfulness.
